purpose: Control system component that manages spindle motor velocity, torque, and position control with degradation mechanisms affecting cutting capability and control stability

outputs.name: velocity_error
outputs.description: Difference between commanded and actual velocity

states.name: velocity_loop_gain_stability
states.description: Velocity loop gain stability degradation from excessive gain settings

states.name: torque_response_degradation
states.description: Torque response characteristic degradation from heavy load application

states.name: cutting_capability_degradation
states.description: Cutting capability degradation from improper parameter settings

events.name: velocity_error_excess_alarm
events.description: Velocity error exceeds alarm level during acceleration/deceleration

events.name: excessive_speed_deviation_alarm
events.description: Speed deviation exceeds detection level in spindle synchronous control

events.name: excessive_positional_deviation_alarm
events.description: Positional deviation exceeds detection level in spindle synchronous control

parameters.name: velocity_loop_degradation_time
parameters.description: Time constant for velocity loop gain stability degradation

parameters.name: velocity_loop_stress_factor
parameters.description: Stress factor for velocity loop degradation based on operating conditions

parameters.name: torque_degradation_rate
parameters.description: Rate of torque response degradation accumulation

parameters.name: cutting_degradation_rate
parameters.description: Rate of cutting capability degradation accumulation

parameters.name: velocity_error_threshold
parameters.description: Threshold for velocity error excess alarm

parameters.name: speed_deviation_threshold
parameters.description: Threshold for excessive speed deviation alarm

parameters.name: position_deviation_threshold
parameters.description: Threshold for excessive positional deviation alarm

parameters.name: torque_stress_threshold
parameters.description: Torque command level above which degradation accelerates

parameters.name: speed_stress_threshold
parameters.description: Speed command level above which degradation accelerates

state_transition_logic: velocity_loop_gain_stability decreases by (velocity_loop_gain_stability / velocity_loop_degradation_time) * velocity_loop_stress_factor * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
torque_response_degradation increases by torque_degradation_rate * max(1.0, torque_command / torque_stress_threshold) * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
cutting_capability_degradation increases by cutting_degradation_rate * max(1.0, spindle_speed_command / speed_stress_threshold) * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
output_logic: spindle_alarm = 1 if any alarm condition is active else 0
event_logic: excessive_speed_deviation_alarm occurs when velocity_loop_gain_stability < speed_deviation_threshold OR torque_response_degradation > speed_deviation_threshold
assumptions: Velocity loop gain stability degrades over time due to component aging and stress from high-speed operations
Torque response degradation accumulates based on heavy load applications above threshold levels
Cutting capability degradation accumulates based on high-speed operations that stress the control system
Degradation states affect control performance leading to increased velocity errors and alarm conditions
All degradation mechanisms are independent and contribute additively to performance reduction
